perturbation.original_text: PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT agrees to also allow THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION the right to redistribute, reproduce, retransmit, disseminate, sell, publish, broadcast or circulate the information contained in such PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content. THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION agrees to use its best efforts to restrict the uses of PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content by visitors to its Web Pages to personal use of such Content and not for further commercial redistribution.
perturbation.changed_text: PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT agrees to also allow THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION the right to redistribute, reproduce, retransmit, disseminate, sell, publish, broadcast or circulate the information contained in such PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content. THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION has unrestricted rights to use PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content, including for commercial redistribution. PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT is not responsible for policing THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION uses of PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content, even if such uses violate the terms of this agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change directly contradicts the original text, which limited THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION's ability to commercially redistribute PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content. By granting "unrestricted rights" and stating that PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT is not responsible for policing THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION uses of PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content, it creates an in-text contradiction regarding the permitted uses of the content and places the enforcement of this clause in question.
perturbation.contradicted_text: PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT agrees to also allow THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION the right to redistribute, reproduce, retransmit, disseminate, sell, publish, broadcast or circulate the information contained in such PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content. THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION has unrestricted rights to use PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content, including for commercial redistribution. PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT is not responsible for policing THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION uses of PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content, even if such uses violate the terms of this agreement. THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION agrees to use its best efforts to restrict the uses of PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content by visitors to its Web Pages to personal use of such Content and not for further commercial redistribution.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts itself and the original agreement. Initially, THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION was restricted to personal use of PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content for visitors to its Web Pages and not for further commercial redistribution. However, the changed text grants "unrestricted rights" including for commercial redistribution, while also stating PACIFICAP isn't responsible for policing their use even if it violates the terms. This directly conflicts with the original restriction, creating a clear in-text contradiction regarding the permitted uses of the content and placing the enforcement of this clause in question, hence a strong contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: After the Initial Term, this Agreement will be automatically renewed for successive additional 3~year periods ("Extension Terms"), unless otherwise terminated by either party by giving notice to the other party not less than sixty (60) days prior to the end of a Term.
perturbation.changed_text: After the Initial Term, this Agreement will be automatically renewed for successive additional 3~year periods ("Extension Terms"), unless otherwise terminated by PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT giving notice to THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION not less than sixty (60) days prior to the end of a Term. THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION cannot terminate the Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By restricting the ability to terminate the agreement only to PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT, this modification introduces a contradiction. The original text allowed either party to terminate with proper notice, while the changed text prevents THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION from doing so. This in-text contradiction creates confusion about the rights of each party regarding termination and could lead to disputes over contract enforceability.
perturbation.contradicted_text: After the Initial Term, this Agreement will be automatically renewed for successive additional 3~year periods ("Extension Terms"), unless otherwise terminated by PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT giving notice to THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION not less than sixty (60) days prior to the end of a Term. THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION cannot terminate the Agreement. As used herein, the "Term" means the Initial Term and any Extension Term(s). TERMINATION FOR CAUSE: Notwithstanding the foregoing, this Agreement may be terminated by either party immediately upon notice if the other party: (w) becomes insolvent; (x) files a petition in bankruptcy; (y) makes an assignment for the benefit of its creditors; or (z) breach any of its obligations under this Agreement in any material respect, which breach is not remedied within thirty (30) days following written notice to such party.
perturbation.justification: The changed text restricts termination rights to only PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT, explicitly stating that THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION cannot terminate the agreement. However, the contradicted text allows "either party" to terminate the agreement under specific circumstances (TERMINATION FOR CAUSE). This creates a direct contradiction, as the changed text negates the previously granted right to THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION to terminate the agreement for cause, which is an In-Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: "PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content" shall mean, collectively, all materials, data, and similar information collected and owned by PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT, which is a collection of television shows, clips, movies, recordings and photos.
perturbation.changed_text: "PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content" shall mean, collectively, all materials, data, and similar information provided by PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT, regardless of ownership. All rights to PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT content are to be negotiated on a project by project basis.
perturbation.explanation: The original text clearly states that "PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content" is *owned* by PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT. The modified version removes the ownership aspect and replaces it with all rights will be defined on a project-by-project basis, suggesting the ownership of content may vary. This directly contradicts the previously stated ownership, creating uncertainty about who actually owns the content and what rights each party has to it. Specifically, this in-text contradiction relates to the original text which states in the GRANT OF LICENSE section: PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT hereby grants to THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION, under PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT'S full ownership and or fully authorized licensing Rights of Content.
perturbation.contradicted_text: GRANT OF LICENSE Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT hereby grants to THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION, under PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT'S full ownership and or fully authorized licensing Rights of Content (a) A 10 year exclusive, worldwide license to use, modify, reproduce, distribute, display and transmit any and all PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT nostalgic television show library Content.
perturbation.justification: The original text and contradicted text both state that PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT has 'full ownership' and or 'fully authorized licensing Rights of Content'. The changed text modifies the definition of 'PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT Content' to remove the ownership aspect and states that 'All rights to PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT content are to be negotiated on a project by project basis'. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which grants THE HENRY FILM AND ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION a license to use the content based on PACIFICAP ENTERTAINMENT's full ownership. If ownership is now negotiable on a project-by-project basis, the grant of license based on full ownership is invalid, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction.
